response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The vocal audio phonetically matches the reference lyrics provided for both 'Bad Apple!!' and 'Magia'. 
2. JSON Usage: The JSON reference lyrics were fully used to structure the text of the songs, keeping accuracy high.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitle durations are tightly timed to correspond directly with vocal starts and stops. On-screen text for the song 'Magia' is subtitled exactly when the overlay appears on screen. Zero delay/cascading was achieved by aligning the end times directly with the subsequent start times where rapid transitions occur.

subtitles.original: 悲しむなんて 疲れるだけよ
subtitles.english: Being sad only tires me out...

subtitles.original: 何も感じず 過ごせばいいの
subtitles.english: I should just get by without feeling a thing.

subtitles.original: 戸惑う言葉 与えられても
subtitles.english: Even if I'm given words of confusion,

subtitles.original: 自分の心 ただ上の空
subtitles.english: My heart is just somewhere else.

subtitles.original: もし私から 動くのならば
subtitles.english: If I were to move of my own accord,

subtitles.original: すべて変えるのなら 黒にする
subtitles.english: If I'm to change everything, I'll turn it black.

subtitles.original: 動くのならば 動くのならば
subtitles.english: If I am to move, if I am to move,

subtitles.original: すべて壊すわ すべて壊すわ
subtitles.english: I will destroy everything, I will destroy everything.

subtitles.original: 哀しむならば 哀しむならば
subtitles.english: If I am to grieve, if I am to grieve,

subtitles.original: 私の心 白く変われる？
subtitles.english: Can my heart turn white?

subtitles.original: あなたのことも 私のことも
subtitles.english: About you, about me,

subtitles.original: すべてのことも まだ知らないの
subtitles.english: And about everything else, I still don't know.

subtitles.original: 重い瞼を 開けたのならば
subtitles.english: If I were to open my heavy eyelids...

subtitles.original: すべて壊すのなら 黒になれ
subtitles.english: If I'm to destroy everything, let it turn black!

subtitles.original: Magia / 作詞・作曲：梶浦由記
subtitles.english: Magia / Lyrics & Composition: Yuki Kajiura

subtitles.original: いつか君が瞳に灯す愛の光が
subtitles.english: The light of love that you will one day ignite in your eyes

subtitles.original: 時を超えて
subtitles.english: Will cross through time,

subtitles.original: 滅び急ぐ世界の夢を
subtitles.english: And surely, it will destroy one dream

subtitles.original: 確かに一つ壊すだろう
subtitles.english: Of a world that is rushing toward destruction.

subtitles.original: 躊躇いを飲み干して
subtitles.english: Swallowing up your hesitation,

subtitles.original: 君が望むモノは何？
subtitles.english: What is the thing that you desire?

subtitles.original: こんな欲深い憧れの行方に
subtitles.english: In the outcome of such greedy longing,

subtitles.original: 儚い明日はあるの？
subtitles.english: Is there a fleeting tomorrow?

subtitles.original: 子供の頃夢に見てた
subtitles.english: Just like the ancient magic

subtitles.original: 古の魔法のように
subtitles.english: I dreamed of when I was a child,

subtitles.original: 闇さえ砕く力で
subtitles.english: With the power to crush even the darkness,

subtitles.original: 微笑む君に会いたい
subtitles.english: I want to meet you, smiling.

subtitles.original: 怯えるこの手の中には
subtitles.english: Inside these trembling hands of mine

subtitles.original: 手折られた花の勇気
subtitles.english: Is the courage of a flower that has been snapped off.

subtitles.original: 想いだけが頼る全て流通
subtitles.english: My feelings are all I have to rely on,

subtitles.original: 光を呼び覚ます
subtitles.english: They are the wish that awakens the light:

subtitles.original: 願い
subtitles.english: A prayer.

subtitles.original: いつか君も誰かの為に購入
subtitles.english: One day, you too will desire great power

subtitles.original: 強い力を望むのだろう
subtitles.english: For the sake of someone else.

subtitles.original: 愛が胸を捉えた夜に
subtitles.english: On the night that love captures your heart,

subtitles.original: 未知の言葉が生まれて来る
subtitles.english: Unknown words will be born.

subtitles.original: 迷わずに行けるなら
subtitles.english: If I can go without hesitation,

subtitles.original: 心が砕けてもいいわ
subtitles.english: I don't care if my heart breaks.

subtitles.original: いつも目の前の哀しみに
subtitles.english: I want a spell to face

subtitles.original: 立ち向かう為の呪文が欲しい
subtitles.english: The sadness always in front of me.

subtitles.original: 君はまだ夢見る記憶
subtitles.english: You are still a memory that dreams,

subtitles.original: 私は眠らない明日
subtitles.english: And I am a tomorrow that does not sleep.

subtitles.original: 二人が出会う奇跡を
subtitles.english: I will move forward to win

subtitles.original: 勝ち取る為に進むわ
subtitles.english: The miracle of us two meeting.

subtitles.original: 怯えるこの手の中には
subtitles.english: Inside these trembling hands of mine

subtitles.original: 手折られた花の刃
subtitles.english: Is the blade of a flower that has been snapped off.

subtitles.original: 想いだけが生きる全て
subtitles.english: My feelings are all I have to live by,

subtitles.original: 心に振りかざす
subtitles.english: They are the wish I wield against my heart:

subtitles.original: 願い
subtitles.english: A prayer.
